About

Not a tech agency that learned sales.
A sales operator who learned to build with AI.

Amoris was started by Praveen Shahi after 10 years in sales and GTM roles — building and leading revenue functions, not just advising on them.

Praveen Shahi

Founder

10 years building and running revenue and GTM systems. The last 2, building AI systems that do what sales teams used to need 10 people for.

Not a developer who added "AI" to their website. Not a consultant with a slide deck. The agents Amoris sells are running in real businesses, handling real calls, right now.

Verified experience
MsgKart (SaaS GTM)

Built GTM from zero — product, pricing, sales motion, first 50 customers.

Great Learning

Led a 150+ person sales organisation. Revenue targets in the hundreds of crores.

CrunchPrep

Took the business from seed to ₹3.5Cr ARR as head of growth.

Clawbot (Voice AI SDR)

Built an AI voice sales development rep that calls, qualifies, and books meetings.

Why Amoris exists

Indian SMBs — and increasingly global companies — have the same problem: too much operational overhead, not enough leverage. They're hiring humans to do things AI can now do reliably.

Most AI agencies are either too technical (they build infrastructure, not business systems) or too vague (they "implement AI" without naming exactly what they're building).

Amoris names the system, scopes the job, and ships it. No vague deliverables. No "AI transformation journeys."

For international clients

India-built doesn't mean India-only. Our pricing at USD rates is 60–70% less than comparable US agencies — not because we cut corners, but because our cost structure is different.

What we commit to for international clients:

  • ✓ Async-first communication with same-day responses
  • ✓ Documentation-heavy delivery — everything is recorded
  • ✓ Timezone overlap: IST covers morning US EST and evening APAC
  • ✓ Data handling per DPDP (India) and GDPR principles on request

Work with us.

30-minute discovery call. No deck. We'll ask about your operations and tell you what we'd build.
